title: Factory Gate Dawn (Ostrock Genre - shot 1)
caption: Ostrock
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I wake up by the river
With dust on my hands
The siren calls the morning
Through the loading yard

My boots know the pavement
My coat knows the rain
I keep a small fire
Under all this gray

[Pre-Chorus]
And I feel it in my chest
When the day begins to climb
One more step, one more breath
We are alive

[Chorus]
Keep on going
Keep on going
We are stronger than the wall

Keep on going
Keep on going
Hear our voices in the hall

[Verse 2]
The factory gate is open
The smoke rolls slow
My brother rides beside me
Where the cold wind blows

We share black bread and laughter
We share the long way home
No one stands alone here
When the night comes on

[Pre-Chorus]
And I feel it in my chest
When the day begins to climb
One more step, one more breath
We are alive

[Chorus]
Keep on going
Keep on going
We are stronger than the wall

Keep on going
Keep on going
Hear our voices in the hall

[Bridge]
Let the hard road shake us
Let the winter bite
We still sing together
Through the falling night

[Chorus]
Keep on going
Keep on going
We are stronger than the wall

Keep on going
Keep on going
Hear our voices in the hall
